description_long: This object is a small, round bread roll with a central hole, resembling a classic bagel. Its surface is golden-brown with a slightly matte finish and a few visible specks, possibly seeds or seasoning, scattered on top. The bread has a smooth, even crust with a subtle sheen, indicating a well-baked exterior. The central hole is clearly defined and the bread appears dense yet soft, typical of bagels. There are no visible slices or cuts, and the bread is presented without any packaging or branding. The object sits on a dark, textured surface that contrasts with its warm, natural color.
description: A small, round, golden-brown bagel with a central hole and a smooth, matte crust, lightly speckled on top.
description_view_0: The bread appears oval with the central hole partially visible and a few specks on the upper surface.
description_view_1: The bread is seen from a lower angle, making the central hole less visible and emphasizing its rounded side.
description_view_2: The top of the bread is visible, showing the central hole and the speckled, golden-brown crust.
description_view_3: A direct top-down view reveals the full circular shape, central hole, and even distribution of surface specks.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is smooth and evenly baked with a matte finish, featuring a few scattered specks that may be seeds or seasoning. There are no visible scores or flour dusting, giving it a classic bagel appearance.
